description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a deep blue fabric, featuring a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The sofa has three backrest sections, each with subtle button tufting, and is complemented by four loose, rectangular throw pillows with a cream base and abstract black patterns. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and align with the backrest, giving the piece a clean, boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on six slender, angled legs with a dark finish, providing a slight elevation and a contemporary touch. The seat cushions are thick and uniform, with a smooth, tailored appearance, and the overall design is minimalist yet inviting. This piece would be well-suited for urban living rooms, lobbies, or lounge areas.
description: A modern L-shaped blue sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, button-tufted backrests, abstract-patterned throw pillows, and sleek angled legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three backrest sections with button tufting, four patterned throw pillows, and the chaise lounge on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the chaise lounge, the straight armrest, and the arrangement of the throw pillows against the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest with subtle tufting and the sofa's clean, uninterrupted lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seating area, armrest, and the placement of the throw pillows along the backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached back cushions with button tufting, two large seat cushions, and four loose rectangular throw pillows; cushions are uniform in size and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at medium height, flush with the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements; simple and modern profile.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, angled legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise; legs have a dark, likely metallic finish and are fully exposed, contributing to a contemporary look.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest divided into three segments with subtle button tufting; backrest is uniform and integrated with the sofa frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric upholstery with a smooth, matte texture; throw pillows feature a cream base with abstract black patterns, adding visual contrast.
